nasb.text: The inheritance of the sons of Simeon was taken from the portion of the sons of Judah, for the share of the sons of Judah was too large for them; so the sons of Simeon received an inheritance in the midst of Judah’s inheritance.

esv.text: The inheritance of the people of Simeon formed part of the territory of the people of Judah. Because the portion of the people of Judah was too large for them, the people of Simeon obtained an inheritance in the midst of their inheritance.

cnv.text: 西緬人的產業是從猶大人的地業中得來的；因為猶大人的分過大，所以西緬人在猶大人的產業中得了他們的產業。

ccb.text: 西缅人的产业是从犹大人的产业中拨出来的，因为犹大支派所分到的地区过于广大，所以要拨出一部分来分给西缅人。
